title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Dr Lal PathLabs

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Dr Lal PathLabs
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Dr Lal PathLabs in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Dr Lal PathLabs:
Dr Lal PathLabs is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr Lal PathLabs!
